name: Journalism & OSINT: conflicting location (London vs Paris)
task: Documents describe a location on 2024-01-15: one says London, one says Paris. Ingest them as evidence, propose one claim per document for the two location claims, link evidence spans as support for each claim, and declare a tension between the conflicting location claims. Export the investigation as .chronicle.

documents.content: Report dated 2024-01-15: the subject was seen in London at 14:00. Witness A confirmed the sighting.
documents.title: witness_report.txt

documents.content: Travel records show a booking to Paris on 2024-01-15. No corresponding London entry for that date.
documents.title: travel_records.txt

documents.content: Summary: conflicting accounts for 2024-01-15 location. London sighting vs Paris booking — resolve before publication.
documents.title: summary.txt
